artPrompt: A characterful portrait of a bewildered red goblin illustrator squinting up at a large blank framed canvas held in its own clawed hands, gesturing confidently at the empty surface as if explaining a masterpiece, paint smeared across its cheeks. Sparks and confetti swirl, a bonfire glows behind in the feral town square. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, self-referential comic confusion, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: This Card Is Also the Art
text:
When This Card Is Also the Art enters the battlefield, look at its own art and describe out loud what you think is happening in it. Be confident.
Its power is equal to the number of distinct objects you named. Its toughness is equal to the number of those objects that are actually there. The artist (AI Generated) is the final judge and is not available for comment.
flavorText: It is a goblin. Probably. There's a lot going on.

extras.physicalAction: describe the card's own art aloud
